title: stellaria media var. cucubaloides
intro: Stellaria media var. cucubaloides, also known as Lesser Celandine, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves, commonly found in shady, moist areas. The medicinal properties of Lesser Celandine include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and iridoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for cold sores and mouth ulcers. Herbal preparations of Lesser Celandine include tinctures, infusions, and creams, which are often used topically to soothe irritated skin and promote wound healing.
